zh.Upper Wick, Worcestershire, England: 英國武斯特斯爾武坡 威克
zh.lifeSummary: 當Dorothy Neville於1496年3月27日出生在英國武斯特斯爾武坡 威克時，她的父親Sir Richard Neville29歲，母親Lady Anne Stafford31歲。她於1514年5月29日與Sir John Dawnay在英國越可爾石內卜 霍爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1575年在英國武斯特斯爾馬德雷斯費爾德享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dorothy Neville于1496年3月27日出生在英国武斯特斯爾武坡 威克时，她的父亲Sir Richard Neville29岁，母亲Lady Anne Stafford31岁。她于1514年5月29日与Sir John Dawnay在英国越可爾石內卜 霍爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1575年在英国武斯特斯爾馬德雷斯費爾德享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

variants.name: Nevills
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevil
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Newill
meanings: English and Irish (or Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevill
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Dorothy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

variants.name: Dorothee
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

variants.name: Dorothie
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When Dorothy Neville was born on 27 March 1496, in Upper Wick, Worcestershire, England, her father, Sir Richard Neville, was 29 and her mother, Lady Anne Stafford, was 31. She married Sir John Dawnay on 29 May 1514, in Snape Hall, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1575, in Madresfield, Worcestershire, England, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dorothy Neville est née le 27 mars 1496, à Upper Wick, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Neville, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Lady Anne Stafford, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Dawnay le 29 mai 1514, à Snape Hall, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1575, à Madresfield, Worcestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dorothy Neville am 27. März 1496 in Upper Wick, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard Neville 29 und ihre Mutter Lady Anne Stafford 31. Sie hat am 29. Mai 1514 in Snape Hall, Yorkshire, England Sir John Dawnay geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1575 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Madresfield, Worcestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dorothy Neville è nata il il 27 marzo 1496 nel Upper Wick, Worcestershire, England, sua padre, Sir Richard Neville, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Lady Anne Stafford, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Dawnay il 29 maggio 1514, nel Snape Hall, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1575, nel Madresfield, Worcestershire, England, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Dorothy Nevilleが1496年3月27日にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウップエル ウィックで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Nevilleは29歳，母Lady Anne Staffordは31歳であった。1514年5月29日にイギリスヨークシュアイアスナペ ハルでSir John Dawnayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1575年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアマドレスフィールドで79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Dorothy Neville(이)가 1496년 3월 27일 영국 워스스터실르 업퍼 윅에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Neville(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Anne Stafford(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1514년 5월 29일 영국 요르크실르 스나프 홀에서 Sir John Dawnay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1575년 영국 워스스터실르 매드레스필드에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dorothy Neville nasceu em 27 de março de 1496, em Upper Wick, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Neville, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Lady Anne Stafford, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Dawnay em 29 de maio de 1514, em Snape Hall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1575, em Madresfield, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dorothy Neville родилась 27 марта 1496 г. в местности уппир викк, ворсестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Richard Neville было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Anne Stafford, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Dawnay 29 мая 1514 г. в местности снап холл, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1575 г. в местности мадресфиелд, ворсестиршир, Англия в возрасте 79 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dorothy Neville nació el 27 de marzo de 1496, en Upper Wick, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard Neville, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Lady Anne Stafford, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Sir John Dawnay el 29 de mayo de 1514, en Snape Hall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1575, en Madresfield, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 79 años.
